decision_register.summary: If we run the skill in a brown field, will it check to make sure that the package folder is following the standard, and it will identify and then fix whatever needs fixing to bring it to the standard? We probably need to document some place if we are intentionally not following the standard so that the follow-on invokes of the skill don't destroy our intent. Which means you would need to read the exception file. or readme or wherever we put the exception information. Am I overcomplicating it? Do you have a better idea?
